page: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v6 is an x86_64 architecture server instance belonging to the Eadv6 family. It features 24 dedicated vCPUs powered by AMD processors and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 28.0 GB per vCPU.

For storage-heavy workloads, the E96-24ads_v6 includes 5669 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, allowing for high-performance disk configurations. It does not include integrated GPU hardware or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Given its massive memory allocation relative to the 24 dedicated vCPUs, this instance offers high resource density for memory-bound applications. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require large in-memory datasets without needing a massive number of compute cores. Suitable workloads include large-scale databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise applications, and heavy data processing tasks.
description: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server instance from the Eadv6 family, utilizing x86_64 AMD processors under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 24 dedicated vCPUs paired with 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high ratio of 28.0 GB of RAM per core. The server includes 5669 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks GPU accelerators and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive enterprise applications, large-scale databases, and in-memory data processing. By offering a massive memory footprint relative to its compute core count, the instance provides a qualitatively cost-efficient solution for workloads requiring substantial RAM capacity without the overhead of excess vCPUs.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96-24ads_v6 is a memory-optimized server featuring 24 dedicated AMD vCPUs, 672.0 GB of RAM, and 5669 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale database and in-memory workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual machine featuring 672 GB of RAM and 5.6 TB of local storage for data-intensive enterprise workloads.
